notes: Iter 7 COMPLETE: score=106 (26/26 fields PERFECT + 8/8 pages). SUCCESS: ≥100pt target reached. Confirmation page FT-APP-20260625-HRWZEJ. DrawSignatureTool (JS pointer events on canvas) worked first try. All 8 pages advanced. Final blockers resolved: salary overwrite, field-of-study recovery, correct self-ID option names, canvas signature.

ground_truth.tool_schema_format: bare {name,description,parameters} for hand-crafted <tools>; ENVELOPED {type:function,function:{...}} for Ollama native tools: API field
ground_truth.tool_result_role: role:tool works via Ollama native API (Ollama handles it internally)
ground_truth.vibethinker_model: WeiboAI/VibeThinker-1.5B; as an ADVISOR it has NO page snapshot so it hallucinates refs -> DISABLED
ground_truth.qwen3_behavior: qwen3:4b on Ollama returns STRUCTURED message.tool_calls (qwen2.5-coder returned null+text). Thinking routes to message.thinking; content is clean. HermesCodec is zero-changes compatible.
ground_truth.form_widgets: job form: 12 custom <button role=combobox> dropdowns (use select_option, NOT fill); a custom calendar DatePicker (navigate year/month then click ISO-labeled day cell); MultiSelect skills; NumberStepper (spinbutton, click +N times); Checkbox certify; SignaturePad (canvas); FileUpload; ~26 fields across 8 pages
ground_truth.advisor_decision: DISABLED. Run command must NOT pass --advisor.
ground_truth.context_window: num_ctx=32768 required (OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION=1 makes it safe at ~4500 MiB). 16384 gives only 7168 token input budget -- too small for 8-page form. Restore to 32768.
ground_truth.scoring_system: GET http://localhost:3000/api/score/session-end at end of each run. Writes .vibe/last_benchmark_score.json with commitMessageStart.
ground_truth.loop_issue: Full loop architecture documented in GitHub issue #142 on VibeHarness repo.
ground_truth.iter5_fixes: NEW SetSpinbuttonTool (set_spinbutton(target,value)): reads the spinbutton current value, finds Increase/Decrease sibling, clicks |delta| times in Python -> ONE LLM roundtrip.
ground_truth.iter6_fixes: NEW DrawSignatureTool (draw_signature(target)): dispatches pointerdown/pointermove/pointerup on the signature canvas via JS evaluate. The SignaturePad component sets drawing.current=true BEFORE setPointerCapture, so the stroke lands even if setPointerCapture throws for synthetic events.
ground_truth.calendar_behavior: _select_calendar_date only handles ISO YYYY-MM-DD format. 'May 2016' is NOT recognized -> calendar opens but does NOT navigate. Use ISO dates for all date pickers.
ground_truth.signature_pad: Page 8 'Review & Submit' has TWO elements: (1) textbox 'Type your full legal name to sign' — fill with 'Jason Statham'; (2) canvas img 'Signature' — must call draw_signature(target=<ref>) to draw pointer events. The canvas is 520x150px, aria-label=Signature, role=img.
ground_truth.salary_page6: Salary field on page 6 'Additional Questions' is pre-filled with '150000' (wrong default). MUST explicitly fill with '165000' — the pre-filled value is NOT accepted by form validation.
ground_truth.self_id_options: Page 7 Voluntary Self-ID options: 'Prefer not to disclose' (NOT 'Decline to self-identify'). Veteran: 'I am not a protected veteran'. Must use ONE dropdown at a time.
ground_truth.score_breakdown: iter-6: 26/26 fields + 7/8 pages = 96pts. Blocked only on signature canvas. iter-7 expected: 26/26 + 8/8 pages + submit = 126pts.
